runTitle: Local AI Retrieval Actual-Use Smoke and Dependency Cleanup QA
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run AI Engine type/test gate

completedImprovements.title: Verify current Knowledge Retrieval Lite RPC works against Supabase
completedImprovements.evidence: npm run supabase:rag:smoke returned [PASS] search_knowledge_text:cpu rows=3 and [PASS] search_knowledge_text:redis-memory rows=3.

completedImprovements.title: Remove unused AI Engine direct dependencies
completedImprovements.evidence: Removed @upstash/redis, js-tiktoken, pg, and @types/pg from cloud-run/ai-engine/package.json after source/test/script import scan and AI Engine knip showed no direct usage.

completedImprovements.title: Keep Langfuse dependency because it is dynamically loaded at runtime
completedImprovements.evidence: cloud-run/ai-engine/src/services/observability/langfuse-client.ts uses import('langfuse' as string); knip reports it as unused because the import is intentionally dynamic.

completedImprovements.title: Actual-use cleanup local gates pass
completedImprovements.evidence: AI Engine type-check and full test passed; root type-check, lint, test:quick, and test:contract passed. Docs and whitespace checks are run after QA record generation.

notes: Live Supabase RPC smoke was executed in this pass, unlike QA-20260510-0444 which only syntax-checked the smoke script.
AI Engine knip still reports Langfuse as an unused dependency, but this is a false positive caused by the deliberate string dynamic import used to keep startup resilient.
AI Engine knip still reports manual local provider scripts and exported public/barrel symbols; those remain review candidates, not confirmed dead runtime.
